zh.Middleton, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可米德萊頓
zh.Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Egeline Courtenay於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓時，她的父親Hugh Courtenay I32歲，母親Eleanor Despencer30歲。她於1309年與Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1335年10月10日在英國諾福爾可米德萊頓享年56歲。

zh-hans.Middleton, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可米德萊頓
zh-hans.Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egeline Courtenay于大约1280年出生在英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓时，她的父亲Hugh Courtenay I32岁，母亲Eleanor Despencer30岁。她于1309年与Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1335年10月10日在英国諾福爾可米德萊頓享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Egeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Eve , or French form of English Evelyn.

variants.name: Evelyn
meanings: Modern use of this as both a boy's and a girl's name derives from a transferred use of an English surname, from the Norman female name Aveline , an elaborated form of Ava . At present it is used more frequently as a girl's name, and is also found as a variant Anglicization of Irish Éibhleann or Aibhilín ( see also Evlin ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Egeline Courtenay was born about 1280, in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Courtenay I, was 32 and her mother, Eleanor Despencer, was 30. She married Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales in 1309, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 October 1335, in Middleton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egeline Courtenay est née environ 1280, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Courtenay I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Despencer, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales en 1309, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1335, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egeline Courtenay um 1280 in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Courtenay I 32 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Despencer 30. Sie hat 1309 in England Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1335 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Middleton, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egeline Courtenay è nata il circa 1280 nel Okehampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh Courtenay I, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Despencer, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales nel 1309, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 ottobre 1335, nel Middleton, Norfolk, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Egeline Courtenayが約1280年にイギリスイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Hugh Courtenay Iは32歳，母Eleanor Despencerは30歳であった。1309年にイギリスでRobert de Scales 2nd Baron Scalesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1335年10月10日にイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Egeline Courtenay(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Courtenay I(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Despencer(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1309년 영국에서 Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 10월 10일 영국 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingd: Okehampton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egeline Courtenay nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Courtenay I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Despencer, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales em 1309, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1335, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egeline Courtenay родилась около 1280 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Courtenay I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Despencer, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales в 1309 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 октября 1335 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Egeline Courtenay nació aproximadamente 1280, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Courtenay I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eleanor Despencer, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales en 1309, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1335, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
